column1: Faculty
APS SYSTEM NOTE
column9: UNIZULU uses the standard NSC 7-point scale. Best 6 subjects are used; Life Orientation is EXCLUDED from APS (earns 0 points). Scale: 80–100%=7; 70–79%=6; 60–69%=5; 50–59%=4; 40–49%=3; 30–39%=2; 0–29%=1. Maximum APS = 42. Two campuses: KwaDlangezwa (main campus — all four faculties) and Richards Bay (satellite campus — Science Centre and selected programmes). Bachelor's degree endorsement required for all degree programmes; Diploma endorsement required for diploma programmes. NSC/SC (matric exemption) required for all degrees. Meeting the minimum APS does not guarantee admission — places are limited and competitive programmes select from the highest APS downward. Faculty structure shown here reflects the 2021 prospectus structure which had multiple named faculties (the university later consolidated to 4 broad faculties). Applications via the Central Applications Office (CAO). Source note: the prospectus PDF at the URL below could not be directly fetched due to SSL restrictions; data corroborated from official UNIZULU faculty web pages, the UNIZULU 2023 Admission Requirements PDF, and the CAO-linked prospectus data.
